tasks.subject: Task 1: Define conduit.Conduit interface
tasks.description: Add Conduit interface with Run(ctx context.Context) error to conduit/conduit.go. Update conduit/conduit_test.go with compile-time assertions (will be satisfied after Tasks 3 & 4). Validation: go test ./conduit/... passes.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create agent/ orchestration package
tasks.description: Implement agent.Agent that holds session.Manager and []conduit.Conduit. Exposes New(mgr), Add(c), Run(ctx). Start conduits concurrently in goroutines, block until ctx cancellation or any error. Validation: go test ./agent/... passes with mock conduits.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Refactor HTTP handler for Conduit interface
tasks.description: Rename NewHandler→New, add WithPort(port string) Option, implement Run(ctx context.Context) error on Handler. Move http.Server creation into Run. Update examples/http-chat/main.go to use agent pattern. Validation: go test ./conduit/http/... passes; go build ./examples/http-chat succeeds.
tasks.activeForm: Refactoring HTTP handler for Conduit interface

tasks.subject: Task 4: Refactor TUI for Conduit interface
tasks.description: Change New(sess)→New(mgr, opts...), add WithThreadID(id string) Option, implement Run(ctx context.Context) error. Create/attach session inside Run. Add ctx.Done()→tea.Quit() goroutine. Update examples/tui-chat/main.go. Validation: go test ./conduit/tui/... passes; go build ./examples/tui-chat succeeds.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Rename Manifest to Blueprint and extend for multi-conduit
tasks.description: Rename Manifest→Blueprint, ParseManifest→ParseBlueprint. Replace single conduit field with Conduits []ConduitConfig (module, options). Rename files manifest.go→blueprint.go, manifest_test.go→blueprint_test.go. Update all forge code and tests. Change default config to blueprint.yaml. Validation: go test ./cmd/forge/... passes.
tasks.activeForm: Renaming Manifest to Blueprint and extending format

tasks.subject: Task 6: Rewrite main.go.tmpl for multi-conduit agent pattern
tasks.description: Rewrite template to generate dynamic imports, agent.New(mgr), loop over conduits calling New(mgr, opts...), agent.Run(ctx). Update GenerateMainGo signature and test expectations. Built-in conduits get hardcoded option translation. Validation: go test ./cmd/forge/... passes.
tasks.activeForm: Rewriting main.go.tmpl for multi-conduit agent pattern

tasks.subject: Task 7: Support go get resolution for external conduit modules
tasks.description: Update Build function to run go get for each non-local conduit module before go mod tidy. Update go.mod.tmpl if needed. Validation: go test ./cmd/forge/... passes; smoke tests pass.
tasks.activeForm: Supporting go get for external conduit modules

tasks.subject: Task 8: Update testdata and example manifests to new blueprint format
tasks.description: Convert all forge.yaml files to multi-conduit blueprint.yaml format with conduits: list. Update smoke test paths if filenames change. Optional: add multi-conduit example. Validation: go test ./cmd/forge/... passes.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Update example applications to demonstrate agent pattern
tasks.description: Rewrite examples/http-chat/main.go and examples/tui-chat/main.go to construct session.Manager, agent.New(mgr), add conduit, agent.Run(ctx). Validation: go build ./examples/http-chat and go build ./examples/tui-chat succeed.
tasks.activeForm: Updating example applications to agent pattern

tasks.subject: Task 10: Full integration validation
tasks.description: Run go test -race ./..., go build ./..., go vet ./.... Fix any races in agent.Agent. Ensure smoke tests and all examples compile.
